debug_info.goal:
V : Type u
inst✝ : DecidableEq V
G : SimpleGraph V
u v : V
p : @SimpleGraph.LoopWalk V G u v
⊢ Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.supportSet V G u v inst✝ p) ≤
    Finset.card (@SimpleGraph.LoopWalk.edgeSet V G u v inst✝ p) + 1

induction p with
  | nil => simp [supportSet, support, edgeSet, edges, darts]
  | cons h q ih =>
    unfold supportSet support edgeSet edges darts at *
    simp only [List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons] at *
    have h1 : (insert u (List.toFinset q.support)).card ≤ (List.toFinset q.support).card + 1 :=
      Finset.card_insert_le u _
    have h2 : (List.toFinset q.support).card ≤ (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts)).card + 1 := ih
    have h3 : (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts)).card ≤ 
              (insert (dartEdge (u, _)) (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts))).card :=
      Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
    omega
  | loop q ih =>
    unfold supportSet support edgeSet edges darts at *
    simp only [List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons] at *
    have h1 : (insert u (List.toFinset q.support)).card ≤ (List.toFinset q.support).card + 1 :=
      Finset.card_insert_le u _
    have h2 : (List.toFinset q.support).card ≤ (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts)).card + 1 := ih
    have h3 : (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts)).card ≤ 
              (insert (dartEdge (u, u)) (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts))).card :=
      Finset.card_le_card (Finset.subset_insert _ _)
    omega

      exact Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card this) 1
    omega
  | loop q ih =>
    unfold supportSet support edgeSet edges darts  
    simp only [List.toFinset_cons, List.map_cons]
    have h1 : (insert u (List.toFinset q.support)).card ≤ (List.toFinset q.support).card + 1 := 
      Finset.card_insert_le u _
    have h2 : (List.toFinset q.edges).card + 1 ≤ (insert (dartEdge (u, u)) (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts))).card + 1 := by
      have : List.toFinset q.edges ⊆ insert (dartEdge (u, u)) (List.toFinset (List.map dartEdge q.darts)) := by
        simp [edges, Finset.subset_insert]
      exact Nat.add_le_add_right (Finset.card_le_card this) 1
    omega
